'''Meirm City''' was the capital city of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sriluur/Legends|Sriluur]], and was described as the heart of Weequay culture. Meirm was located on the [[Copper Coast]] of the acidic [[Meirm Sea]].

Because of its proximity to the sea, in the early morning, the city was often covered with a coppery fog composed of sea spray and chemicals that could harm the skin of sensitive [[Species/Legends|species]]. This mist left behind a copper-colored dust if not washed away before midday. Meirm City was known as the center of [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] culture on Sriluur, and much of the planet's traffic moved through the city.

Meirm City was the location of the [[Meirm Speeder Emporium]], a dealership located on the outskirts of the city and owned by [[Torsha Dawun]]. It was also home to [[Gricul Salvage Yards]], a famous repair yard owned by [[Xizor Transport Systems/Legends|Xizor Transport Systems]].

The city was [[Invasion of Sriluur|attacked]] by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].<ref name="LCaL" />

==Behind the scenes==
''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'' states that [[Al-Campur]] is the "administrative center" of Sriluur. However, other sources designate Meirm City as the capital. At one point in ''[[Last Call at Leatherback's]]'', it is misspelled as "Meim City."
